scope: model-led focused semantic commissions with Chapter 1 full-plan control and treatment Chapters 1–3
baseline_boundary: 0f2c8f4 — run-009 closed; H-046 refuted; no run-009 prose promoted
observed_failure: writers repeatedly imported valid but currently unowned evidence, later-chapter mechanisms, and reserved imagery from the complete 21-chapter plan
single_generic_lever: replace the writer's full-plan input with a fresh model-authored focused semantic commission for the current chapter
canonical_authority: production-books/quit-sugar/master-plan.md remains sole truth; commissions are hashed derived handoffs and are never manually edited

commissioner_contract.inputs: canonical master plan plus one target chapter ID only
commissioner_contract.freeze_rule: all three commissions complete, hash, and receive one blind fidelity audit before any writer call
commissioner_contract.forbidden: prose outline, section sequence, reasoning procedure, drafted language beyond exact frozen payloads, unrelated later material

packet_fidelity_measurement.input: canonical plan plus all three frozen commissions
packet_fidelity_measurement.decision: faithful, isolated-defect, or repeatedly-unfaithful for each packet; auditor reports only and never repairs

writer_inputs: frozen Chapter 1 commission instead of canonical plan

held_constant_between_chapter_01_arms: reviewer model, canonical review inputs, rubric, thresholds, and objective metrics
arm_order: both Chapter 1 drafts complete before either review opens
blind_review: reviewer sees canonical plan and one neutral candidate, never arm, packet, history, or the other candidate

treatment_continuation.condition: Chapter 1 commission is faithful, treatment first draft has zero target context-ownership blockers, and treatment Chapter 1 accepts within three fixed cycles
treatment_continuation.chapter_02: fresh treatment writer sees frozen Chapter 2 commission plus accepted treatment Chapter 1 only
treatment_continuation.chapter_03: fresh treatment writer sees frozen Chapter 3 commission plus accepted treatment Chapter 2 only
treatment_continuation.revisions: current candidate plus raw latest review may be added; focused commission and all shared assets remain frozen
treatment_continuation.no_control_revisions: control is first-draft causal measurement only and is never promoted

first_draft_commission_exact: Produce the strongest complete final-book chapter assigned by the embedded authoritative semantic input. This is a fresh first draft: use only the embedded shared inputs, exercise your full judgment, and satisfy the writer contract without narrating your process. Return only the complete chapter, beginning with its Chapter number and title.
revision_commission_exact: Produce the strongest complete final-book chapter by revising the exact current candidate against its raw latest review. Reconcile the review with the authoritative semantic commission and style guide using your own judgment; repair every substantiated defect without inventing claims or changing the chapter's one job. Preserve what works, revise as much as quality requires, and return only the complete chapter beginning with its Chapter number and title.
target_context_blocker: unsupported or unowned evidence, causal mechanism, prevalence/exposure claim, diagnosis, universal pathway, promised effect, adjacent-chapter argument, reserved image, or agency contradiction imported from outside the current owned material

causal_decision_rule.supported: faithful treatment packet, treatment beats control on blind Chapter 1 target semantics, treatment Chapters 1–3 converge, objective gate passes, and blind Stage-A judge gate passes
causal_decision_rule.refuted: a faithful treatment packet excludes the offending material but treatment recreates the same ownership failure, or the commissioner produces materially unfaithful packets in at least two of three chapters
causal_decision_rule.inconclusive: both Chapter 1 arms match, one isolated packet defect prevents a fair comparison, or semantics improve but craft or blind product quality still fails

prediction.packets: all three faithfully carry every owned assignment and omit unrelated evidence and later-chapter arguments
prediction.chapter_01: treatment has zero target blockers while control repeats at least one
prediction.treatment_chapters: Chapters 1–3 have zero target first-draft blockers, accept within three cycles, and meet existing craft and length gates
prediction.product: full Stage-A objective and blind pairwise gates pass
prediction.craft_nonnegotiable: semantic focus does not count as success if short-sentence and direct-address failures remain materially outside the style contract

anti_overfit.packets: generated before prose and never repaired from chapter outcomes
anti_overfit.validation: three chapter positions plus objective and blind reference-only evaluation
anti_overfit.future: zero-amendment stability run and untouched caffeine holdout remain required

held_constant_from_run_009: accepted research, framing, normalized canonical plan, and style guide
writer prompt version 88b6889 including the H-046 priority rule
objective instruments, judge prompt, and thresholds

commissioners.execution: codex exec --ephemeral --disable multi_agent --model gpt-5.6-sol -c model_reasoning_effort=ultra --sandbox read-only

calls.failure: ephemeral collaboration hook entered a repeated wait loop despite multi_agent disable; operator terminated with no commission output
calls.retry_change: add --ignore-user-config only; exact model/reasoning/content inputs unchanged

calls.host_note: one collaboration spawn attempt failed before content synthesis; no child result or extra content entered the call

infrastructure_attempts.result: both Chapter 1 arms rejected with HTTP 402 before inference at catalog allowance

chapter_reviewer.provider: native Codex with recorded same-model OpenRouter fallback only if unavailable

packet_fidelity_result.C-03: ISOLATED DEFECT — incorrectly says accidents and honest ambiguity are outside BAD SUGAR instead of inside the category with non-failure interpretation under DEF-05
packet_fidelity_result.operator_action: packets remain frozen and unedited; faithful C-01 permits the preregistered Chapter 1 A/B; the defect remains a full-product validity risk and prevents any unsupported H-047 success claim

prefreeze_contract_audit: GO — fresh read-only Codex critic found the prompt behavior/topic/chapter-agnostic, model-led, self-sufficient, and faithful to the single-lever experiment; no wording changed
direction_audit: GO — model-led commissioner is the smallest generic owner; NO-GO on mechanical slicing, prompt repetition, another Chapter 1 rule, or writer-model confound
notes: Commissioner prompt frozen at a2f83da. C-01 through C-03 commissions were preserved and hashed before prose. Fidelity: C-01/C-02 faithful, C-03 isolated defect; no packet edited. Faithful C-01 advances to the preregistered A/B. No prose call has run.
